ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "grand_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., processing, complete, cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., shipped, pending, delivered) */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax rate applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "order_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Details of the payment method (e.g., credit card number, PayPal account) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option (e.g., ground, air, express) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_shipments" (
  "order_shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option used */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipments_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "tax_rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax rate */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Tax rate value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the refund belongs to */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was initiated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the discount expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_discounts" (
  "order_discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order discount */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the discount belongs to */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_discounts_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_discounts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
